recommendations.description: Rule uses 'describe_brokers' method which does not exist in boto3 mq service. Should be 'list_brokers' (which returns BrokerSummaries matching the response_path). Method belongs to mq service - not a cross-service issue.
recommendations.impact: Method name correction needed - will cause execution errors if not fixed

recommendations.description: Both rules check DeploymentMode but with different scopes: Rule 1 checks multiple deployment modes across brokers (BrokerSummaries[]), Rule 3 checks specific ACTIVE_STANDBY_MULTI_AZ mode on broker instances (BrokerInstances[]). These are distinct checks and should remain separate.
recommendations.impact: No action needed - rules serve different purposes

validation_summary.notes: All discoveries correctly use items_for for arrays. All field paths match emit structure. Test executed successfully with no errors. All 3 rules are properly configured. Note: Only 1 check executed per account (5 total) because dependent discoveries (describe_broker) require brokers to exist, and no brokers were found in the accounts.
